info.title: Navixy Platform API
info.description: Navixy GPS tracking platform REST API. Provides endpoints for tracker management, user authentication, geofence management, task management, fleet management, history/events, reporting, notifications, billing, and more. All API calls are POST requests with JSON bodies. Authentication is via a session hash obtained from the user/auth endpoint.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a session hash for subsequent API calls.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or expired session hash
Unauthorized - invalid or expired session hash
